shared_voice_rules: Use conversational spoken lines (short clauses, no formal essay tone).
Keep wording native to TikTok feed language, avoid generic SEO phrasing.
Carry the same opener intent across hook/caption/title (do not switch premise mid-chain).
shared_cta_rules: CTA = action-oriented but still value-first; ask for one clear next step.
shared_monetization_rules: Monetization fit: trust-building first (value/proof), then soft conversion.
Do not use hard-sell language before delivering payoff.
